title: Chasing the Rains
desc: The elephants dig wells as the rain suddenly pours; a group of lions kill one of cheetah Kuleta's cubs; wild dog Phoenix fights off a pack of hyena.

title: Predator Countdown
desc: Take a trip to Africa, where the law of the jungle prevails and allows curious minds to observe the lives of lions, crocodiles and cheetahs.

title: Predator Countdown
desc: A closer look at Australia's arid landscape and the incredible battles between predators and prey, including a large monitor lizard, saltwater crocodiles and more.

title: Brotherhood of Lions
desc: Five male lion cubs compete with each other while hunting their prey, but their family ties become increasingly complicated as they make their gradual rise to reign in the territory.

title: Texas Gator Savers
desc: Gary, Arlie, and Jake search for a gator in an RV park and Shannon finds a timber rattlesnake at a local business. The team trades gators with their sister park in South Padre Island, Texas.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
desc: See some of wildlife's most remarkable moments, caught on film by amateurs and professionals.

title: A Game Of Leopard Thrones
desc: Filmed over ten years, an in-depth look at the leopard characters of South Africa and their fascinating unfolding story once their Queen dies.

title: Jungle Planet
desc: Cameras capture the beauty, diversity and richness of the world's forests and jungles.

title: Great Parks of Africa
desc: In the northeastern corner of South Africa lays a land of beauty with beaches and coral reefs.

title: Great Parks of Africa
desc: In the centre of South Africa is an ancient landscape that was once an inland sea.

title: Traps & Ambushes
desc: Takes a look at intricate, trap-like structures that animals build to capture prey.

title: Jungle Planet
desc: Spanish juniper woods are some of the most characterful in the world. Each juniper tree has its own shape, and the woodlands are adapted to cold and dry climates.

title: River Monsters
desc: The disappearance of three men in Russia proves to be a baffling case for Jeremy Wade. He embarks on a trip to the Amur River where he seeks to uncover what happened to them.

title: Texas Gator Savers
desc: Gary, Arlie, and Jake search for a gator in an RV park and Shannon finds a timber rattlesnake at a local business. The team trades gators with their sister park in South Padre Island, Texas.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
desc: See some of wildlife's most remarkable moments, caught on film by amateurs and professionals.
